name: new-generation-tournament
description: Sito statico per la gestione e la pubblicazione di un torneo.

scripts.test: node tools/validate-project.mjs && node tools/test-calendar-constraints.mjs && node tools/test-match-card-scorers.mjs && node tools/test-scorer-consistency.mjs
scripts.test:edge: tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --lib ES2022,DOM,DOM.Iterable --skipLibCheck tools/edge-function-test-globals.d.ts supabase/functions/team-photos/index.ts
scripts.test:kings-audit: node tools/test-kings-scorer-audit.mjs && node tools/test-kings-export-audit.mjs && node tools/test-kings-aux-pdf-audit.mjs && node tools/test-kings-sync-audit.mjs && node tools/test-kings-image-visual.mjs && node tools/test-kings-print-pdf.mjs
